vectors.description: Typical attachment: ASCII name, image media type, two distinct timestamps.

notes.serialization: file_id(16) || u32 LE len + name utf8 || u32 LE len + media_type utf8 || log_time u64 LE || create_time u64 LE

vectors.description: Attachment with empty name and empty media type (both length-zero strings).

notes.serialization: file_id(16) || u32 LE len + name utf8 || u32 LE len + media_type utf8 || log_time u64 LE || create_time u64 LE

vectors.description: Attachment with multibyte UTF-8 name to confirm length prefix is byte count, not codepoint count.

notes.serialization: file_id(16) || u32 LE len + name utf8 || u32 LE len + media_type utf8 || log_time u64 LE || create_time u64 LE
